components.name: anyhow
components.description: Flexible concrete Error type built on std::error::Error

components.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>
components.name: bstr
components.description: A string type that is not required to be valid UTF-8.

components.author: Carl Lerche <me@carllerche.com>, Sean McArthur <sean@seanmonstar.com>
components.name: bytes
components.description: Types and traits for working with bytes

components.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
components.name: cfg-if
components.description: A macro to ergonomically define an item depending on a large number of #[cfg] parameters. Structured like an if-else chain, the first matching branch is the item that gets emitted.

components.name: crossbeam-deque
components.description: Concurrent work-stealing deque

components.name: crossbeam-epoch
components.description: Epoch-based garbage collection

components.name: crossbeam-utils
components.description: Utilities for concurrent programming

components.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
components.name: darling
components.description: A proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives.

components.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
components.name: darling_core
components.description: Helper crate for proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives. Use https://crates.io/crates/darling in your code.

components.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
components.name: darling_macro
components.description: Internal support for a proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when implementing custom derives. Use https://crates.io/crates/darling in your code.

components.author: Alissa Rao <aura@aura.moe>
components.name: derive_setters
components.description: Rust macro to automatically generates setter methods for a struct's fields.

components.author: Chris Wong <lambda.fairy@gmail.com>, Dan Gohman <dev@sunfishcode.online>
components.name: errno
components.description: Cross-platform interface to the `errno` variable.

components.author: Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
components.name: fnv
components.description: Fowler–Noll–Vo hash function

components.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>
components.name: globset
components.description: Cross platform single glob and glob set matching. Glob set matching is the process of matching one or more glob patterns against a single candidate path simultaneously, and returning all of the globs that matched.

components.author: Ted Driggs <ted.driggs@outlook.com>
components.name: ident_case
components.description: Utility for applying case rules to Rust identifiers.

components.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>
components.name: ignore
components.description: A fast library for efficiently matching ignore files such as `.gitignore` against file paths.

components.author: The Rust Project Developers
components.name: libc
components.description: Raw FFI bindings to platform libraries like libc.

components.author: Amanieu d'Antras <amanieu@gmail.com>
components.name: lock_api
components.description: Wrappers to create fully-featured Mutex and RwLock types. Compatible with no_std.

components.author: The Rust Project Developers
components.name: log
components.description: A lightweight logging facade for Rust

components.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>, bluss
components.name: memchr
components.description: Provides extremely fast (uses SIMD on x86_64, aarch64 and wasm32) routines for 1, 2 or 3 byte search and single substring search.

components.author: Carl Lerche <me@carllerche.com>, Thomas de Zeeuw <thomasdezeeuw@gmail.com>, Tokio Contributors <team@tokio.rs>
components.name: mio

components.author: Amanieu d'Antras <amanieu@gmail.com>
components.name: parking_lot
components.description: More compact and efficient implementations of the standard synchronization primitives.

components.author: Amanieu d'Antras <amanieu@gmail.com>
components.name: parking_lot_core
components.description: An advanced API for creating custom synchronization primitives.

components.name: pin-project-lite
components.description: A lightweight version of pin-project written with declarative macros.

components.author: David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>, Alex Crichton <alex@alexcrichton.com>
components.name: proc-macro2
components.description: A substitute implementation of the compiler's `proc_macro` API to decouple token-based libraries from the procedural macro use case.

components.name: quote
components.description: Quasi-quoting macro quote!(...)

components.author: The Rust Project Developers, Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>

components.author: Andrew Gallant <jamslam@gmail.com>
components.name: same-file
components.description: A simple crate for determining whether two file paths point to the same file.

components.author: bluss
components.name: scopeguard
components.description: A RAII scope guard that will run a given closure when it goes out of scope, even if the code between panics (assuming unwinding panic).  Defines the macros `defer!`, `defer_on_unwind!`, `defer_on_success!` as shorthands for guards with one of the implemented strategies.

components.author: Erick Tryzelaar <erick.tryzelaar@gmail.com>, David Tolnay <dtolnay@gmail.com>
components.name: serde

components.name: serde_core

components.name: serde_derive

components.name: socket2
